subject: [PATCH 16/24] nfsd: add helper to marshal a fattr4 from completed args

2026-04-07.patch_summary: This patch refactors the code that encodes attribute values in an NFSv4 file attribute (fattr4) from a completed operation. It breaks out the encoding of actual attr_vals into a separate function, nfsd4_encode_attr_vals(), which takes a struct xdr_stream and a u32 bitmap as arguments. This change simplifies the code and makes it easier to maintain.
